---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# Actin-wave frequency: per-neurite and per-cell across polarization stages

## What this file does

Reads in-line per-cell wave-event count tables (segregated by polarization
stage: unpolarized, polarizing, polarized, and by neurite type: axon, minor
neurite) and computes per-neurite and per-cell actin-wave frequencies.
Three PDFs are written (`ggsave` at lines 154, 201, 275) producing the
violin / scatter + boxplot comparisons.

## Manuscript panels

- **Fig 2h**: "Frequency of actin waves per neurite before polarization and
  per axon and minor neurite after polarization. N = 31 neurons from 5
  experiments. ***p < 0.001; *p < 0.05 by Kruskal-Wallis test followed by
  Dunn's post-hoc test with Bonferroni correction. Exact P values are shown."
- **Fig 2i**: "Frequency of actin waves per cell. N = 23 unpolarized, 36
  polarizing and 34 polarized neurons from 3 to 5 experiments. *p < 0.05;
  ns, p >= 0.05 by Kruskal-Wallis test followed by Dunn's post-hoc test with
  Bonferroni correction. Exact P values are shown."

(Feeds Fig 2h/i and additional ED Fig 2 panels per Source Data mapping.)

Source Data: `Fig 2h`, `Fig 2i`, `ED Fig 2a`, `ED Fig 2b`.

## Outputs

- Three violin / scatter + boxplot PDFs (`ggsave` at lines 154, 201, 275).

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure 2_actin wave/Fig. 2g/S2S3_transition/wave_count.Rmd
-->



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(ggpubr)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```


## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "wave_count.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)
```

```{r}
S2S3_wave_count <- S2S3_wave_count %>% as.data.table()
```

# Wave count of minor neurite
```{r}
S2S3_wave_count_minor <- S2S3_wave_count [grep('Minor', S2S3_wave_count$axon_minor) ]


# Summed wave freq of minor neurites before polarization
S2S3_wave_count_minor_before <- aggregate(S2S3_wave_count_minor$freq_before, by=list(Label=S2S3_wave_count_minor$Label, Batch=S2S3_wave_count_minor$Batch), FUN=sum)
names(S2S3_wave_count_minor_before) <- c("Label","Batch", "freq")
S2S3_wave_count_minor_before$polarization <- "before"

# Summed wave freq of minor neurites after polarization
S2S3_wave_count_minor_after <- aggregate(S2S3_wave_count_minor$freq_after, by=list(Label=S2S3_wave_count_minor$Label, Batch=S2S3_wave_count_minor$Batch), FUN=sum)
names(S2S3_wave_count_minor_after) <- c("Label","Batch", "freq")
S2S3_wave_count_minor_after$polarization <- "after"

S2S3_wave_count_minor_neuriteNum <- S2S3_wave_count_minor %>% dplyr::count(Label)


S2S3_wave_count_minor_before$NeurtieNum <- S2S3_wave_count_minor_neuriteNum$n
S2S3_wave_count_minor_after$NeurtieNum <- S2S3_wave_count_minor_neuriteNum$n

S2S3_wave_count_minor_2 <- rbind(S2S3_wave_count_minor_before, S2S3_wave_count_minor_after)
S2S3_wave_count_minor_2$axon_minor <- "minor"

# Average wave freq of individual minor neurite 
S2S3_wave_count_minor_2$freq_avg <- S2S3_wave_count_minor_2$freq/S2S3_wave_count_minor_2$NeurtieNum
```


# Wave count of axon
```{r}
S2S3_wave_count_axon <- S2S3_wave_count[axon_minor == "Axon"]
S2S3_wave_count_axon <-  S2S3_wave_count_axon[, .(Label, Batch, freq_before, freq_after)]
S2S3_wave_count_axon$axon_minor <- "axon"
names(S2S3_wave_count_axon) <- c("Label" ,"Batch", "before", "after",  "axon_minor" )

S2S3_wave_count_axon <- S2S3_wave_count_axon %>% pivot_longer(cols=c("before", "after"), names_to ="polarization", values_to = "freq")
S2S3_wave_count_axon$NeurtieNum <- 1
S2S3_wave_count_axon$freq_avg <- S2S3_wave_count_axon$freq/S2S3_wave_count_axon$NeurtieNum
```


```{r}
S2S3_wave_count_2 <- rbind(S2S3_wave_count_axon, S2S3_wave_count_minor_2) %>% as.data.table()


S2S3_wave_count_2$group <- paste(S2S3_wave_count_2$axon_minor, S2S3_wave_count_2$polarization, sep = "_")
S2S3_wave_count_2$ID <- paste(S2S3_wave_count_2$Label, S2S3_wave_count_2$group, sep = "_")

# convert wave freq from wave/min to wave/hour
S2S3_wave_count_2$freq <- S2S3_wave_count_2$freq *60
```

```{r}
NA_Label <- S2S3_wave_count_2 %>% filter(is.na(freq))

S2S3_wave_count_2 <- S2S3_wave_count_2[! (Label %in% NA_Label$Label)]

outliers <- S2S3_wave_count_2 %>% 
  group_by(group) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(freq) 

S2S3_wave_count_2 <- S2S3_wave_count_2[! (Label %in% outliers$Label)]
```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
library(plotly)
my_comparisons <- list(c("axon", "minor"))

my_comparisons <- S2S3_wave_count_2$group %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 
```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

S2S3_wave_count_2 %>% mutate(group = factor(group, levels=c("axon_before",   "axon_after", "minor_before", "minor_after"))) %>% 
ggplot ( aes(x=group, y=freq, fill =axon_minor) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
# geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=pj)+
 # geom_line(aes(group = Label))+
  
   geom_point(position = pj) +
  geom_path(aes(group = Label),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
    
    
scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-2, 12), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=T)+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "S2S3_waveFreq.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

dev.off()
```

```{r}

S2S3_wave_count_2$group_2 <- S2S3_wave_count_2$group 
S2S3_wave_count_2[polarization =="before"]$group_2 <- "before"
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- S2S3_wave_count_2$group_2 %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 

pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

S2S3_wave_count_2 %>% mutate(group_2 = factor(group_2, levels=c("before", "minor_after", "axon_after"))) %>% 
ggplot ( aes(x=group_2, y=freq) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
# geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=pj)+
 # geom_line(aes(group = Label))+
  
   geom_point(position = pj) +
  #geom_path(aes(group_2 = Label),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
    
    
scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-2, 12), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=F)+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "S2S3_waveFreq_revised.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

dev.off()
```


```{r}
freq_before_polarization <- S2S3_wave_count %>% group_by(Label, Batch) %>%  
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(freq_before) %>% 
  as.data.table()

freq_before_polarization$axon_minor <- "neurite"
freq_before_polarization$polarization <- "before"


freq_before_polarization$mean <- freq_before_polarization$max * 60

freq_before_polarization <- freq_before_polarization[ ,.(Batch, Label, axon_minor, polarization, mean)]


names(freq_before_polarization)[[5]] <- "freq"

S2S3_wave_count_2_after <- S2S3_wave_count_2[polarization == "after"][ ,.(Batch, Label, axon_minor, polarization, freq)]

S2S3_wave_count_3 <- rbind(freq_before_polarization, S2S3_wave_count_2_after)

#S2S3_wave_count_3 <- rbind(S2S3_wave_count_before, S2S3_wave_count_2_after)
```

```{r}

outliers <- S2S3_wave_count_3 %>% 
  group_by(axon_minor) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(freq) 

S2S3_wave_count_3 <- S2S3_wave_count_3[! (Label %in% "Long2_LifeactmScar01_44_R3D.dv")]
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- S2S3_wave_count_3$axon_minor %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 

pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

S2S3_wave_count_3 %>% mutate(axon_minor = factor(axon_minor, levels=c("neurite", "axon", "minor"))) %>% 
ggplot ( aes(x=axon_minor, y=freq) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
# geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=pj)+
 # geom_line(aes(group = Label))+
  
   geom_point(position = pj) +
 # geom_path(aes(group = Label),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
    
    
scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-2, 10), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=F)+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "S2S3_waveFreq_revised_2.pdf",
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

# Totol wave count per cell
```{r}
S2S3_Total_wave<- S2S3_wave_count %>% 
  group_by(Label, Batch, Polarization_point, Post_polarization) %>%  
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(before, after) %>% 
  as.data.table()

S2S3_Total_wave$wave_count <- (S2S3_Total_wave$n * S2S3_Total_wave$mean) %>% round()

S2S3_Total_wave_2 <- S2S3_Total_wave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = wave_count, id_cols=c("Batch", "Label", "Polarization_point", "Post_polarization"))

S2S3_Total_wave_2$before_wave_hour <- (S2S3_Total_wave_2$before/S2S3_Total_wave_2$Polarization_point)*60
S2S3_Total_wave_2$after_wave_hour <- (S2S3_Total_wave_2$after/S2S3_Total_wave_2$Post_polarization)*60

S2S3_Total_wave_3<- S2S3_Total_wave_2 %>% pivot_longer(cols = c("before_wave_hour", "after_wave_hour"), names_to = "polarization", values_to = "wave_hour") %>% as.data.table()
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- list(c("before_wave_hour",   "after_wave_hour"))
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

S2S3_Total_wave_3 %>% mutate(polarization = factor(polarization, levels=c("before_wave_hour",   "after_wave_hour"))) %>% 
ggplot ( aes(x=polarization, y=wave_hour, fill =polarization) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
# geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=pj)+
 # geom_line(aes(group = Label))+
  
   geom_point(position = pj) +
#  geom_path(aes(group = Label),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
    
    
scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-2, 20), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=F)+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

```

# ignoring polariztion point
```{r}
S2S3_Total_wave_3$wave_hour_2 <- 60* (S2S3_Total_wave_3$before + S2S3_Total_wave_3$after)/(S2S3_Total_wave_3$Polarization_point + S2S3_Total_wave_3$Post_polarization)
```

```{r}
S2S3_Total_wave_3[polarization=="before_wave_hour"] %>% 
ggplot ( aes(x=polarization, y=wave_hour_2, fill =polarization) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
# geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=pj)+
 # geom_line(aes(group = Label))+
  
   geom_point(position = pj) +
#  geom_path(aes(group = Label),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
    
    
scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-2, 12), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=F)+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
saveRDS(S2S3_Total_wave_3, "S2S3_Total_wave_3.rds")
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "wave_count.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)
```
